case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. MARQUAN WADE ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 57760580) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT WADE, MARQUAN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-17-2015 CONTINUED TO APR-19-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-17-2015 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WADE, MARQUAN $1,923.71 PRINCIPAL, $294.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,217.71, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 58881360)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 58881360) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
